summary: Iteration 98: Mobile Responsiveness Testing - Verified all font size fixes and mobile layout at Desktop (1920x1080), Tablet (768x1024), and Mobile (390x844) viewports. Found and fixed one CSS issue: Integration Carousel tool names were 10px instead of 11px minimum. All tests now pass.

mobile_390x844.horizontal_scroll: PASS - No horizontal scroll on any section
mobile_390x844.hero_fonts_12px_min: PASS - All text >= 12px (except decorative BIQc badge)
mobile_390x844.intelligence_diagram_labels: PASS - Labels (Business Signals, Finance Systems, etc.) are 12px
mobile_390x844.integration_carousel_names: PASS - Tool names (Xero, HubSpot, etc.) are 11px after fix
mobile_390x844.login_page_touch_targets: PASS - Form inputs 48px height, submit button 48px
mobile_390x844.login_form_visible: PASS - All form elements visible without scroll
mobile_390x844.bottom_nav_visible: PASS - Bottom nav visible with 5 items

tablet_768x1024.homepage_render: PASS - All sections visible and readable

desktop_1920x1080.all_sections_visible: PASS - Hero, stats, intelligence diagram, carousel, cognition, CTA all visible

bug_fixed.issue: Integration Carousel tool names showing 10px instead of 11px minimum on mobile
bug_fixed.root_cause: CSS specificity conflict - more specific selector (.logo-card span) at line 139 had 10px, overriding the general span selector at line 401 which had 11px
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed line 139-141 in mobile.css from 'font-size: 10px !important' to 'font-size: 11px !important'
bug_fixed.verified: PASS - Integration Carousel now shows 11px minimum font size

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Mobile CSS properly handles all font size fixes with !important overrides
GOOD: All touch targets meet 44px minimum height requirement on mobile
GOOD: Bottom nav displays correctly with 11px readable text
GOOD: Cognition tabs are horizontally scrollable with proper touch targets
FIXED: Integration Carousel tool names now 11px minimum (was 10px)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness verified at all viewports. One CSS bug fixed (integration carousel font size 10px->11px). All homepage sections, login page, and advisor page render correctly on mobile. Bottom nav text is 11px and readable. Cognition tabs have 46px min-height and are horizontally scrollable. Preview URL https://business-brain-redis.preview.emergentagent.com used for testing (not beta.thestrategysquad.com which caches old builds).
